page_header.label: HOW IT WORKS
page_header.title: The Anatomy of a Confidential Payment
page_header.description: A deep dive into the cryptographic and technical architecture that makes ZKIRA Pay secure and private.

items.title: CREATE
items.description: Sender deposits tokens into an on-chain escrow account. A unique payment link with embedded claim secret is generated. The escrow is time-locked with configurable expiry for automatic refunds.

items.title: SHARE
items.description: Payment link is sent via any channel—Telegram, email, QR code, or direct message. The link contains only the claim secret. No wallet addresses are ever exposed in transit.

items.title: CLAIM
items.description: Recipient opens the link and connects their wallet. Our gas relayer sponsors the claim transaction. Funds arrive at a stealth address derived from the recipient's meta-address.

paragraphs: The ZKIRA Pay payment pipeline involves multiple components working together: sender wallet, escrow program, claim secret generation, gas relayer, stealth address derivation, and recipient wallet. Each step is cryptographically secured and operates without trusted intermediaries.

items.title: Stealth Addresses
items.description: Every payment generates a unique one-time address. Your main wallet address remains completely private while staying publicly shareable.

items.title: Escrow Model
items.description: No direct wallet-to-wallet transfers. All payments go through smart contract escrow, breaking the on-chain connection between sender and receiver.

items.title: Gas Relayer
items.description: Recipients don't need SOL to claim payments. Our gas relayer sponsors all claim transactions, removing another privacy leak.

sections.label: SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE
sections.title: Three-Layer Architecture
sections.subtitle: ZKIRA Pay is built as a modular system with clear separation between application, protocol, and network layers.

sections.title: Ready to try it?
sections.description: Experience confidential payments firsthand. Create your first payment link and see how simple privacy can be.
